action.hypothesis: The round 93 crash was a pure implementation gap: `two_code_residual_vq` was missing from architecture validation and SAE factory dispatch. Registering the architecture and adding a minimal runnable two-code residual-VQ sparse coder under `sparsify/` should unblock the original `K=40, EF=12` proxy experiment without changing its intended design.
action.summary: Patched the existing experiment target so `two_code_residual_vq` can instantiate and train: added the architecture to config validation, wired factory dispatch, and implemented a minimal `TwoCodeResidualVQSparseCoder` that composes two hard codebook selections before sparse residual correction. Local smoke test passed for config validation, factory lookup, forward, and backward.
action.self_review: Kept the repair scoped to `sparsify/` and preserved the original experiment target and env overrides. Verified the new class on a local instantiate/forward/backward smoke test; the next likely blocker, if any, would be a deeper training-time issue rather than the previous unknown-architecture crash.
notes_to_memory: Round 93 repair attempt 1 fixed a concrete registration blocker for `two_code_residual_vq` under `sparsify/` only.
Added `two_code_residual_vq` to `TrainConfig` architecture validation and `_get_sae_class` dispatch.
Implemented a minimal runnable `TwoCodeResidualVQSparseCoder` by extending the existing residual-VQ pattern with a second hard codebook/router stage before sparse residual coding.
Local smoke test passed: config validation, factory dispatch, forward, and backward all succeeded for `architecture=two_code_residual_vq`, `k=40`, `expansion_factor=12`.
repair attempt 1: runtime preserved the original experiment target and constrained this step to blocker repair only
next_hypotheses: Re-run the original round 93 proxy target unchanged now that the unknown-architecture crash is repaired.
If the next run crashes again, keep the experiment fixed and patch only the concrete new traceback in `sparsify/` as repair attempt 2.
If the run completes, judge `two_code_residual_vq` on low-K quality at the exact `(K=40, EF=12)` comparison point before any further architecture work.
